prompt: Only the last added button is visible. What is the bug?
choices: JFrame cannot hold more than one component at a time
JFrame's default BorderLayout places all components added without a constraint in the CENTER position; each new component replaces the previous one
JButton components must be wrapped in a JPanel to display side by side
setSize must be called before adding components
explanation: JFrame uses BorderLayout by default. Calling add(component) without a position constraint places the component in BorderLayout.CENTER. Only one component can occupy CENTER, so each addition replaces the last, and only "Three" appears. Fix: use a JPanel with FlowLayout or specify constraints like frame.add(btn, BorderLayout.NORTH).
